name: Lightning Bolt
oracle: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

oracle: Counter target spell.

name: Force of Negation
oracle: If it's not your turn, you may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Counter target noncreature spell.

name: Helm of Awakening
oracle: Spells cost {1} less to cast.

oracle: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

name: Ruby Medallion
oracle: Red spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

name: Wear // Tear
oracle: Destroy target artifact. Fuse (You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.)

name: Hurkyl's Recall
oracle: Return all artifacts target player owns to their hand.

name: Force of Vigor
oracle: If it's not your turn, you may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Destroy up to two target artifacts and/or enchantments.

name: Boseiju, Who Endures
oracle: Channel — {1}{G}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land an opponent controls.

name: Damping Sphere
oracle: If a land is tapped for two or more mana, it produces {C} instead of any other type and amount. Each spell a player casts costs {1} more to cast for each other spell that player has cast this turn.

name: Stony Silence
oracle: Activated abilities of artifacts can't be activated.

name: Pithing Needle
oracle: As this artifact enters, choose a card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated.

name: Phyrexian Revoker
oracle: As this creature enters, choose a nonland card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated.

name: Karn, the Great Creator
oracle: Activated abilities of artifacts your opponents control can't be activated.

name: Brainstorm
oracle: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

name: Preordain
oracle: Scry 2, then draw a card.

name: Consider
oracle: Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard. Then draw a card.

name: Mishra's Bauble
oracle: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Look at the top card of any player's library. Draw a card at the beginning of your next upkeep.

name: Thoughtseize
oracle: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland, non-creature card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life.

name: Mox Opal
oracle: Metalcraft — {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control three or more artifacts.

name: Springleaf Drum
oracle: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Add one mana of any color.

name: Cranial Plating
oracle: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 for each artifact you control. {1}: Attach this Equipment to target creature you control. Equip {1}

name: Reanimate
oracle: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to its mana value.

name: Goryo's Vengeance
oracle: Splice onto Arcane {2}{B}{B} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.) Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

name: Demonic Tutor
oracle: Search your library for a card and put that card into your hand. Then shuffle.

name: Urza's Saga
oracle: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — This Saga gains "{T}: Add {C}." II — This Saga gains "{2}, {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with 'This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.'" III — Search your library for an artifact card with mana cost {0} or {1}, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

name: Trinisphere
oracle: As long as this artifact is untapped, each spell that would cost less than three mana to cast costs three mana to cast.

name: Pinnacle Emissary
oracle: Warp {1}{R} (You may cast this spell from your hand for its warp cost. If you do, exile it.) When this creature enters, exile target nonlegendary, nonland permanent.
